comment:
$$\frac{2\cdot 8^{x-1}}{2\cdot 8^{x-1}-1}\geq\frac{3}{8^x-1}+\frac{8}{64^x-5\cdot 8^x+4}\\ \frac{\frac{2\cdot 8^x}{8}}{\frac{2\cdot 8^x}{8}-1}\geq\frac{3}{8^x-1}+\frac{8}{64^x-5\cdot 8^x+4}\Rightarrow \frac{\frac{8^x}{4}}{\frac{8^x-4}{4}}\geq \frac{3}{8^x-1}+\frac{8}{64^x-5\cdot 8^x+4}$$
\(\frac{8^x}{8^x-4}\geq\frac{3}{8^x-1}+\frac{8}{64^x-5\cdot 8^x+4}\), пусть \(8^x=a\)
$$\frac{a}{a-4}\geq\frac{3}{a-1}+\frac{8}{a^2-5a+4}\Rightarrow \frac{a}{a-4}-\frac{3}{a-1}-\frac{8}{(a-1)(a-4)}\geq 0\Rightarrow\\ \Rightarrow \frac{a(a-1)-3(a-4)-8}{(a-1)(a-4)}\geq 0\\ \frac{a^2-a-3a+12-8}{(a-1)(a-4)}\geq 0\Rightarrow \frac{a^2-4a+4}{(a-1)(a-4)}\geq\Rightarrow \frac{(a-2)^2}{(a-1)(a-4)}\geq 0$$
Значит, нам подходит:
$$\displaystyle \left[ \begin{array}{l l} a< 1\\ a=2\\ a >4 \end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l} 8^{x} < 1\ \\ 8^{x} =2\\ 8^{x} >4 \end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l} 2^{3x} < 2^{0} \ \\ 2^{3x} =2^{1}\\ 2^{3x} >2^{2} \end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l} 3x< 0 \ \\ 3x=1\\ 3x >2 \end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l} x< 0 \ \\ x=\frac{1}{3}\\ x >\frac{2}{3} \end{array} \right.$$
Получили: \(x\in (-\infty;0)\cup\{\frac{1}{3}\}\cup\left(\frac{2}{3};+\infty\right)\).

Ответ: \(x\in (-\infty;0)\cup\{\frac{1}{3}\}\cup\left(\frac{2}{3};+\infty\right)\)
